# mixpanel_data_governance_settings (Resource)

Manages the data governance settings for a Mixpanel project.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "mixpanel_data_governance_settings" "example" {
  project_id = 1234567
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `project_id` (Number)
